Header.title: Autonomous Robotics
Header.paragraph: Autonomous systems designed for efficiency, innovation, and real-world results.

About.paragraph: AUVEXIS is a robotics technology company focused on developing intelligent autonomous systems for modern industries. Our mission is to improve efficiency and productivity through advanced robotics, artificial intelligence, and smart automation solutions.

Services.name: Autonomous Delivery Robots
Services.text: Efficiently transport goods in hotels, warehouses, and smart facilities, reducing human labor.

Services.name: Intelligent Navigation Systems
Services.text: Advanced AI-driven path planning and obstacle avoidance for  reliable autonomous operations.

Services.name: Robotics for Hospitality
Services.text: Service robots designed to assist guests, manage room deliveries, and enhance the guest experience.

Services.name: Warehouse Automation
Services.text: Streamlined logistics with autonomous picking, sorting, and material handling systems.

Services.name: Smart Infrastructure Integration
Services.text: Seamless connection of robots with IoT, building management, and AI monitoring systems.

Services.name: Maintenance & Support
Services.text: Comprehensive deployment, technical support, and system updates for reliable 24/7 operations.

Gallery.title: SERBOT
Gallery.description: Serbot is a cutting-edge waiter robot standing 150 cm tall and weighing 45 kg. It features a 12-hour battery life, a 15 kg loading capacity, and smart navigation powered by LiDAR and AI technology. Equipped with a 10.1" touch LCD display, Serbot interacts naturally with customers, delivers items efficiently, and provides assistance in restaurants, hotels, and events. Designed for smooth and engaging service, Serbot combines functionality with a friendly and approachable presence.
